rules.howtoplay.title: How To Play
rules.howtoplay.description:
Select a bet size, then press the Spin button to begin.
To use autoplay, press the Autoplay button and select the desired number of rounds.
Autoplay is started and stopped by clicking the autoplay icon where applicable.
While playing, you can always see how many autoplay spins you have left.
Press the "Home" icon to exit game.
rules.howtoplay.description.addition: To make sure the game will continue when waiting for player input, the game will auto continue automatically after a set amount of time. This can be turned off in the settings menu.
rules.howtoplay.description.auto1: To use autoplay, press the Autoplay button and select the desired number of rounds.
rules.howtoplay.description.auto2: Autoplay/Quickspin is started and stopped by clicking the autoplay/quickspin button icons where applicable. Quick spin mode, where the total spin time is shorter. When quick spin mode is active, the arrow symbols are turned green, and when clicked again, quick spin mode is deactivated.
rules.howtoplay.description.auto3: While playing, you can always see how many autoplay spins you have left.
rules.howtoplay.description.exit: Press the "Home" icon to exit game.
rules.howtoplay.description1: Select a bet size, then press the Spin button to begin.
rules.buy.freespin.rule1: Buying "Free Spins" can only be done in the base game.
rules.buy.freespin.rule2: The theoretical return to player for the buy feature is {{RTP}}%.
rules.buy.freespin.rule3: Bought "Free Spins" is played at {{value}}x your regular bet.
rules.buy.freespin.rule4: Buying "Free Spins" can only be done in the base game.
rules.buy.freespin.rule5: Bought "Free Spins" is played at {{value}}x your regular bet.
jackpot.won: A jackpot of {{count}} has been won by another player.
game.rules.rule1: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the paytable.
game.rules.rule2: Only the highest paying combination for each payline is paid.
game.rules.rule3: Wins are evaluated consecutively on a payline, starting from leftmost reel.
game.rules.rule4: Wins on multiple paylines are added.
game.rules.rule5: Once a spin has been initiated, the bet size for that round is locked and cannot be changed.
game.rules.rule6: Winnings are presented in the user's currency.
game.rules.rule7: The wild symbol substitutes for all symbols on the reels.
game.rules.rule8: The theoretical return to player for this game is {{RTP}}%.
game.rules.rule9: Malfunction voids all pays and plays.
game.rules.rule10: Incomplete games will be automatically resolved after 2 days. Any winnings resulting from automatic resolve shall be paid to the player's account.
game.rules.rule11: If your balance decreases so it becomes lower than the selected bet size, the bet size will automatically be lowered to the highest applicable bet size.  (Applicable based on market)
game.rules.rule12: The English version of the game rules prevails.
game.rules.rule7.ExceptBonus: The wild symbol substitutes for all symbols on the reels except the bonus symbol.

featureTrigger.start: You have a feature trigger worth {{amount}}!
settingstoggledescriptionanticipatePersi: IF TURNED OFF, ANTICIPATION SPINS ON PERSISTENT SYMBOLS WILL BE SKIPPED
settingstoggledescriptionshowTransitions: IF TURNED OFF, NEXT TIME THE BONUS ROUND IS TRIGGERED, TRANSITION SCREENS WILL BE SKIPPED
lafiesta.rose02: Falleras Free Spins is triggered by landing the base scatters on reels 1 and 3, along with the rose scatter on reel 5. Once the feature has been triggered, a mini game will be presented to decide the number of starting spins and the multiplier the feature will start with. Every rose that lands will award one additional spin in the minigame. When no more spins are awarded, the total number of roses (both ordinary and gold) determines the number of free spins, and the total number of golden roses determines the multiplier during free spins. You can land additional roses in the feature once it has started.
lafiesta.freespin02: Landing 3 Scatters will trigger the Free Spins. There are 4 different free spin rounds to trigger in this game. What bonus you trigger is determined by the Scatter on reel 5.
lafiesta.wild: Wild symbols substitute for all other symbols except Bonus symbols when evaluating wins.
lafiesta.freespin03: Once triggered, you always have the option to gamble for a chance to upgrade that feature!
lafiesta.tomato02: La Tomatina Free Spins is triggered by landing the base scatters on reels 1 and 3, along with the tomato scatter on reel 5. Once this feature has been triggered, 7 free spins are awarded. During the feature any tomato wilds that land on the reel area will turn into sticky wilds and remain in place for the duration of the feature.
lafiesta.bull02: Pamplona Free Spins is triggered by landing the base scatters on reels 1 and 3, along with the bull scatter on reel 5. Once this feature has been triggered, 6 Free Spins will be awarded with the bull symbol Mega Stacked on the reels.
lafiesta.stalion02: San Joan Free Spins can only be triggered from the La Fiesta Tour Bus by a successful gamble from the Pamplona Free Spins. Once in the feature, you will be presented with a Stallion Wild symbol along with a progressive multiplier. This wild will stand vertically upon landing and move between the reels. During each move, the game will re-spin and the multiplier on the symbol will increase by +1. Once the Stallion Wild falls to a horizontal position, you will be awarded one final re-spin along with a final +1 to your multiplier.
lafiesta.bus01: La Fiesta Tour Bus Gamble Feature
lafiesta.bus02: When any free spin has been awarded in base game, there are always two options: Gamble and Collect. Choosing Collect initially will trigger the free spin round that was awarded with the scatters from the base game. Choosing to Gamble gives a 50-50 chance of upgrading or downgrading the awarded feature. There is no limit to how many times a feature can be gambled but if you land on No Win you will be returned to the base game and if you reach the top feature, San Joan Free Spins, the feature will launch automatically.
lafiesta.latomatina02: This feature is triggered randomly at the start of any spin. Once the feature is active, wild symbols will be thrown at the reel area and land into a symbol position. Once these symbols land they will stick in place for the duration of the round.
lafiesta.pamplona02: This feature is triggered randomly at the start of any spin. Once the feature is active the bull symbol will become mega stacked on the reels for the duration of that round.
lafiesta.sajoan02: This feature is triggered randomly at the start of any spin. Once the feature is active, a Donkey Wild symbol along with a progressive multiplier are presented. This wild will stand vertically upon landing and move between the reels. During each move, the game will re-spin and the multiplier on the symbol will increase by +1. Once the Donkey Wild falls to a horizontal position, you will be awarded one final re-spin along with a final +1 to your multiplier.
lafiesta.buyfeature02: The feature buy allows direct triggering of the Free Spins round for the price displayed. Once the feature has been purchased, the game will guarantee that 3 scatters land and the La Fiesta Free Spin tour is launched. The feature triggered will be determined by the scatter on reel 5 and it’s possible to gamble or collect from there.
lafiesta.gamerules01: “La Fiesta” is a 5 reels and 4 rows slot machine with 40 pay lines. The game is always played with all pay lines active.
lafiesta.gamerules02: The Wild symbols substitute for all symbols on the reels for pay line wins.
lafiesta.gamerules05: When free spins are triggered, there is always 2 options available:
lafiesta.gamerules06: Gamble: Choosing to Gamble gives a 50-50 chance of upgrading or downgrading the current feature.
lafiesta.gamerules07: Collect: Choosing Collect will activate the current feature.
lafiesta.gamerules08: Reaching the top feature on the gamble (San Joan Free Spins) will launch it automatically.
lafiesta.gamerules09: Reaching No Win will return the game to the base state.
lafiesta.gamerules11: Falleras Free Spins is triggered by landing the base scatters on reels 1 and 3, along with the rose scatter on reel 5.
lafiesta.gamerules12: Once the feature has been activated, a mini game will be presented to decide the number of starting spins and the multiplier.
lafiesta.gamerules14: Gold Roses = +1 Free Spin and +1 Multiplier
lafiesta.gamerules15: Once no more roses land in the mini game, the free spins will begin.
lafiesta.gamerules16: You can land additional red roses in the feature once it has started, which will award an extra spin.
lafiesta.gamerules18: La Tomatina Free Spins is triggered by landing the base scatters on reels 1 and 3, along with the tomato scatter on reel 5.
lafiesta.gamerules19: Once this feature has been activated 7 free spins are awarded.
lafiesta.gamerules20: During the feature any wilds that land on the reel area will turn into sticky wilds and remain in place for the duration of the feature.
lafiesta.gamerules22: Pamplona Free Spins is triggered by landing the base scatters on reels 1 and 3, along with the bull scatter on reel 5.
lafiesta.gamerules23: Once this feature has been activated 6 Free Spins are awarded.
lafiesta.gamerules24: During the feature the highest paying symbol (bull) is mega stacked on all reels.
lafiesta.gamerules25: Prancing Horse (San Joan Free Spins) Rules
lafiesta.gamerules26: San Joan Free Spins can only be awarded through the tour bus gamble feature.
lafiesta.gamerules27: Once the feature is active, a horse wild symbol along with a progressive multiplier is presented.
lafiesta.gamerules28: The wild will stand vertically upon landing, starting at the bottom row and reaching 3 rows up.
lafiesta.gamerules29: Before each spin, except the initial spin, the wild will move to one of the adjacent reels or fall down. If not falling down an additional spin will be awarded.
lafiesta.gamerules30: Each spin the multiplier on the wild increases by +1.
lafiesta.gamerules33: La Tomatina is activated randomly at the start of a spin.
lafiesta.gamerules34: Once the feature is active, a number of wild symbols will be placed on random positions on the game area, where they will stick for the duration of the round.
lafiesta.gamerules36: The Pamplona feature is activated randomly at the start of a spin.
lafiesta.gamerules37: Once the feature is active, the bull symbol will become mega stacked on the reels for the duration of that round.
lafiesta.gamerules39: San Joan is activated randomly at the start of a spin.
lafiesta.gamerules40: Once the feature is active, a donkey wild symbol along with a progressive multiplier are presented.
lafiesta.gamerules41: The wild will stand vertically upon landing, starting at the bottom row and reaching 2 rows up.
lafiesta.gamerules42: Before each spin, except the initial spin, the wild will move to one of the adjacent reels or fall down. If not falling down an additional spin will be awarded.
lafiesta.gamerules43: Each spin the multiplier on the wild increases by +1.
lafiesta.gamerules45: The ‘Buy Feature’ can only be activated in the base game.
lafiesta.gamerules46: Purchasing the feature will cost 50 times the chosen bet size.
lafiesta.gamerules47: Once the feature is triggered, 3 scatters are guaranteed to land.
lafiesta.gamerules48: The scatter on reel 5 determines the feature triggered.
lafiesta.gamerules49: Autoplay is started and stopped by clicking the autoplay icon where applicable.
gamble.feature01: Features can be upgraded or downgraded in the Gamble Feature.
gamble.feature: The same rules apply to the Gamble Feature as to when it’s triggered with 3 bonus symbols.
rtp.buyfeature: The theoretical RTP (return to player) for the ‘Buy Feature’ is {{BUYRTP}}%
